content:
I feel like most stages in arc 1 normal mode got hit a bit too hard with the new nerf. Some hp values in chapter 8 are similar or just lower than chapter 4-5 bosses which feels really weird. I think it would also be a problem for players who would finish arc 1 and enter arc 2 where enemies have astronomically higher numbers (and i really wouldn't suggest nerfing arc 2 content as well), or even just madness stages of events or higher alerts in D-Tides.
I think that before the main story's content had a better flow with its difficulty, without being unfair in the slightest. I wouldn't say the game needs to revert the nerf but it should be in my opinion toned down.

An addition that the hard mode for arc 1 also felt like it got nerfed as well. 

Really disappointing since hard mode isn't related to story, rather it's a challenge. I'd like to see the hard mode get reverted back before the patch or at least rebalanced so it's not NM+.

I'm guessing they want to introduce the madness difficulty in story, which by look of it, will be as hard as the old hard difficulty if they nerf everything. I didn't expect hard to be nerfed, but oh well

i dont know anything past chapter 6 for now, but i do kinda feel that they decided to nerf it that hard so that 3rd difficulty has a place to fit in 
plus, they kinda need it to streamline newbie progress a bit, cuz some casuals might not like being story gatekeeped by difficulty? but im not sure whether thats a good or bad thing
but yeah, some things weren't adjusted too well
40k damage achievement on last stage of chapter 6 now basically means you have almost otk the boss, which is incomparable to what achievements were before
second this, while I'm mostly a casual player I appreciate the challenge the game offered, maybe something in between the past and current difficulty would be a good point
third this, it should be re-balanced to still be challenging at all
as well as just roll back hard mode to what it was
i feel like the perfect balance would be inbetween the current hp counts and the old ones would be great 60k-70k per eyeball seems reasonable
with the curtrent buffs even
before even the first nerf all of my deaths were on the last phases. It felt hard, but not unfair.
Basically completely removing the damage walls/fortitude from the final ch8 boss is whacky as well. There's no "it's time to survive" moments
such jarring changes game design wise
i feel like this should instead be a new story difficulty below normal
imagine beating ch9 then seeing the difficulty difference with arc 2 ch1

Agree with all
Even tho I can understand that they wanted to tone it down cuz new players mostly 
But this is really too much
1 of main points and charm of Mori is challenge that battles bring. Rn is just meh for arc 1 
It def should be somewhere in between to before and now. 
Cuz even if they wanted to difficulty rise is not so sudden and more balanced this ain't it. It def should be harder than rn or then players who didn't unlock arc 2 yet will cry when come there cuz it will be nightmare I guess compared to arc1 cuz that will be hugeee jump in difficulty too. And then what... Nerf that too??? 

Hard mode should've stayed as it was and normal should be somewhere in between from how it was and how ridiculous is now

Also I wish they didn't remove buffs choices in madness stage of Phantasmal dive. That was great for following growth imo. And beating higher and higher buffs each time. So I wish they bring that back too.
I like the idea of an easy mode, and having the olld balancing as normal mode. They can share rewards ,and you could run down normal just for street cred/ pride
yup
hard mode can stay as is and we can always get a madness later
i wonder if side story battles were nerfed too
It's so disappointing how they approach the difficulty. The nerf was overtuned.
Honestly, just revert the difficulty back imo. It's not like the game was impossible before.
I guess this has been fixed, also love how fast and smooth the skip is, you guys rocks (and hope you all will be able to rest soon enough after the other hotfixes)
While owning an SSR ‘Wheel’ at +12, obtaining an additional duplicate SSR ‘Wheel’ results in the new copy being automatically dismantled. This appears to be a bug.
this has become a feature as of this patch, since you have no use of the base wheel anyway
Isn’t that just from an old player’s point of view? I spent my own money to pull it, so why am I being stripped of my choice?
Indeed that is bad...is there no button in the Settings menu that disables it?
There isn’t… nothing in the settings lets you turn it off, unfortunately.
<@1131790839291596841> Hello 🤗 I hope the team can look into this as soon as possible because I believe it's a very serious issue because real money is involved in getting those duplicate wheels
i mean, you can't use 2 copies of the same wheels anywhere, so the only use can be to stack them and use an Origin of Time for them, and that is only for Standard wheels
and that is valid, if one want to go for that

Unfortunately, I’m forced to use the Origin of Time on a Standard Wheel, as I only have one +12 Standard Wheel. This matters a lot to me.

With this patch, new and veteran players end up having different experiences specifically regarding the Origin of Time.

Imagine you’re a new player. You have a +12 'Blade of the Titan' WOD, a +3 'Blade of the Titan' WOD, and a +9 'Incalculable Factor' WOD. Can you imagine how frustrating this patch would feel in that scenario?

😭
are you trying to use it on a limited wheel?
i dont understand what you are trying to do
he want to use it on a Standard wheel that he has more copy of after he already staked the first +12 one
at this time the game automatically break down the duplicates after +12
? im still holding the extra wheels i have
yeah, but if you get a new one after you get the same to +12. it will get broken down
you won't be able to going forwards, is the thing
since the patch anything past +12 is automatically dismantled, you don't have a choice in the matter

I requested this once previously, so I will be copy and pasting some of the previous post, as the problems are still present.

The auto-scroll in the English language is incredibly disruptive and is severely hurting my experience with the game. The biggest part of this game's appeal is its story, but its story is being hindered by a poor auto-scroll feature that is causing people, myself included, to be pulled out of the story and break immersion. For me personally, I have had the recent event dialogues totally ruined by being frustrated at the poor auto-scroll completely disrupting the flow of the story. Below are three examples of why the auto-scroll is a problem.

Scenario 1: The text often scrolls before the player is given time to properly take in what has been said, requiring the player to check the logs to re-read it and breaking immersion.

Scenario 2: The game does not allow you to proceed to the next dialogue box until the scroll has finished. This becomes a problem when simple, easy to understand sentences are written and you want to advance to the next dialogue window but have to wait for the scroll to finish in order to do so.

Scenario 3: Because there is no instantaneous text display, people like me who are used to faster text speeds click once to have the entire dialogue box filled immediately. With auto-scroll, it now becomes a guess whether I am about to skip dialogue or not because of scrolling text when I do this. 

All three of these scenarios are very obnoxious and have a negative impact on the experience of players and were not a problem with the old system of spilling over into a new dialogue window. I know that I am not the only player bothered by this, I have seen several others complain about this feature; including players new to the game who hadn't played using the old system. Please revert this change to maintain the immersion and player enjoyment of the story.

I am about at my wit's end with this auto-scroll ruining my experience.

I reached the character limit for my post so I will be adding my 4th issue here:

There are instances where a fade-in from black is used for transition and by the time the screen has faded back in, a line of dialogue has already been scrolled off screen. This has happened to me multiple times in the past few weeks.

I beg you, PLEASE change this feature before I have to quit the game because the story is no longer enjoyable.

content: The Piercing Damage don't Pierce the Immune status like it should

Just some feedback and thoughts I have. 
I don't usually play gacha games because I find most of them being too predatory for customers despite me liking the general concept, and Morimens was one of those rare gacha games I could play without thinking about how the developers try to psychologically affect my actions.
That being said the new update changed the store layout and now every time you enter it you need to first go through the cash shop before you can even access the Exchange store-
Even if that exposure is not predatory enough for an average player I still think its just increadibly annoying to click through several tabs just to get to the store page you need especially when you need to visit it multiple times
thread_title: New store update feels predatory and it sucks

content:
I love the changes to 👻 dive. The replay and watch feature is amazing.

I think a way to make it better is if players could click thier rank (example, I would click 298) and it would bring me to my spot on the leaderboard.

Then I could scroll up and see players a few ranks above me and what team they used/maybe a better way to play it at my level.

Some feedback players are having is its great to see the top players' replays, but it would be nice to see players near your rank and their replays too.

Thanks!
I conveyed this suggestion, but it cannot be implemented at the moment. Sorry

content:

It should be resolved when you manually select a language in-game!
